header.title: Help Center
header.intro: Start with the topics below. If none of them solve your issue, click the “Support” launcher in the bottom-right corner — our AI assistant will try to help first and hand off to a human when needed.

billing.title: Trials, Plans & Billing
billing.body: Trial rules, plan comparisons, how video duration is counted, no charge for failed jobs, and more.

uploadAuth.title: Uploading Videos & Rights
uploadAuth.body: Supported video sources (local file / YouTube / other links) and the rights you need to confirm.

expressStudio.title: Express vs. Studio Mode
expressStudio.body: The differences between the two processing modes and which one to pick for your use case.

jianyingDraft.title: Downloading CapCut Drafts & Asset Packs
jianyingDraft.body: Where to download, when to regenerate, and how to keep editing in CapCut.

failureTroubleshooting.title: Troubleshooting Failed Jobs
failureTroubleshooting.body: Common failure causes, retry strategies, and whether credits are charged.

refundPrivacy.title: Refunds, Copyright & Privacy
refundPrivacy.body: These cases are handled directly by our support team — reach out via the support launcher or email.

contact.title: Contact Human Support
contact.intro: Click the “Support” launcher in the bottom-right corner to start a chat. When the AI agent can’t resolve your issue — or it involves billing, refunds, copyright, or privacy — a human ticket is created automatically and our team replies by email.
contact.emailPrefix: You can also email us directly at
